channel.title: SciML Daily
channel.description: New papers in Scientific ML, AI for Scientific Computing & Applied Math — every morning.

item.title: HeurekaBench: A Benchmarking Framework for AI Co-scientist
item.description: Introduces a benchmarking framework for evaluating LLM-based co-scientist agents in scientific analysis tasks. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Reliable Fine-Grained Evaluation of Natural Language Math Proofs
item.description: Proposes a methodology and dataset for evaluating LLM-generated natural language mathematical proofs. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Adaptive Rollout Allocation for Online Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
item.description: Uses a Gaussian process model and convex optimization to dynamically allocate rollout budgets in reinforcement learning. (tags: foundations, uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Epistemic Uncertainty Quantification To Improve Decisions From Black-Box Models
item.description: Develops estimators for grouping loss and excess decision risk to quantify epistemic uncertainty in black-box models. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Rethinking Code Similarity for Automated Algorithm Design with LLMs
item.description: Proposes a method to measure algorithmic similarity of LLM-generated code to enhance automated algorithm design. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: A Relative Error-Based Evaluation Framework of Heterogeneous Treatment Effect Estimators
item.description: Proposes a robust evaluation framework and neural network architecture for heterogeneous treatment effect estimation. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Condition Errors Refinement in Autoregressive Image Generation with Diffusion Loss
item.description: Uses Wasserstein Gradient Flows and Optimal Transport theory to refine condition errors in autoregressive image generation. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: Flow Along the $K$-Amplitude for Generative Modeling
item.description: Proposes K-Flow, a generative flow matching framework across frequency/scale domains with applications to scientific and image generation. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: Online Conformal Prediction with Adversarial Semi-bandit Feedback via Regret Minimization
item.description: Develops a mathematical framework for online conformal prediction (uncertainty quantification) under partial feedback using adversarial bandit theory. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Diffusion Language Models are Provably Optimal Parallel Samplers
item.description: Provides a rigorous mathematical analysis of diffusion language models as parallel samplers, proving expressivity and complexity bounds. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: When to Retrain after Drift: A Data-Only Test of Post-Drift Data Size Sufficiency
item.description: Proposes a data-only test for concept drift in streams generated by dynamical systems using weighted local regression. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Implicit Regularization of SGD Reduces Shortcut Learning
item.description: Analyzes the mathematical and statistical properties of SGD implicit regularization in reducing shortcut learning. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Attention Sinks and Compression Valleys in LLMs are Two Sides of the Same Coin
item.description: Provides a mathematical analysis connecting attention sinks and compression valleys to massive activations in the residual stream of LLMs. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Efficient Message-Passing Transformer for Error Correcting Codes
item.description: Proposes an efficient transformer-based decoder for error correcting codes, accelerating numerical decoding computations. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)
